fundamentals.name: iShares Russell 2000 ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The fund generally invests at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of its underlying index and in investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the component securities of its underlying index (i.e., depositary receipts representing securities of the underlying index) and may invest up to 20% of its assets in certain futures, options and swap contracts, cash and cash equivalents.

news.paragraph: The iShares Russell 2000 ETF (IWM) is mentioned in the context of currency movements and geopolitical uncertainty, with one article suggesting it could be a potential area of interest for investors. However, the specific impact of the Iran deal uncertainty on IWM is not detailed, and the other article broadly questions the investment radar for Vanguard Small-Cap Index Fund ETF Shares (VB), which tracks a similar segment of the market. No imminent catalyst specific to IWM is apparent from these headlines.

headlines.title: Dollar Holds Firm Amid Iran Deal Uncertainty: ETFs to Win/ Lose
